DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Giorgio Cassandra, Esq. 323-302-8102 424-333-7566 goc@bhattorneys.com BD&J, PC for Plaintiff.
Audrey Tam, Esq. 415-433-0990 Wilson Elser Moskowitz Edelman & Dicker LLP for Defendant.

ARGUED. Mr. Cassandra states he was not properly served, due process issue, requests to continue or to deny without prejudice. Ms. Tam responds.

9:29am
The Court orders parties to meet and confer.

9:44am
The matter is recalled. Parties report they have an agreement. Ms. Tam withdraws the Demurrer; Parties will further meet and confer and a demurrer will be refiled if parties cannot agree to the correct address.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT LABOR RESOURCE GROUP, INC. DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

The Court vacates the tentative ruling.

Defendant Labor Resources Group, Inc.'s unopposed Demurrer to Complaint is Off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
